name: skill-manager
description: Visualize, inspect, and audit local Codex skills from a plugin-backed data layer.

interface.shortDescription: Visual browser for local Codex skills.
interface.longDescription: Skill Manager scans local Codex skill folders, extracts frontmatter and summaries, and prepares the data needed for a visual skill browser, audit view, and future in-Codex management panel.
defaultPrompt: 打开 skill 管理器并刷新到最新。
查找描述偏短或名称重复的 skills。
按来源查看我安装的 Codex skills。
